findings.message: Error-level logging used for normal operational cleanup counts and IDs
findings.suggestion: Change 'r.log.Error' to 'r.log.Info' or 'r.log.Debug' for successful cleanup operations, as these are expected operational events, not errors

findings.message: Error-level logging used for successful cleanup operation reporting
findings.suggestion: Change 'r.log.Error' to 'r.log.Info' for successful cleanup completion, reserving Error level for actual failures

findings.message: String concatenation in loop for building SQL values list
findings.suggestion: Consider using strings.Builder or pre-allocating slice capacity for better performance when building the comma-separated values string

findings.message: Cleanup job interval reduced from 10 minutes to 1 minute
findings.suggestion: Verify this frequency increase is intentional and won't cause excessive load, especially with the new two-phase cleanup approach
